visual_description: A man in a dark suit and patterned tie stands in the center of a dimly lit control room, wearing a headset microphone. Behind him, several men work at computers and examine a wall of photographs, while one man in a blue jacket with 'OCTB' on the back faces away. The central man looks straight ahead with a neutral expression.
audio_description: A low, steady voice speaks into a telephone, accompanied by the ambient hum of the control room.
